name: educate
description: Turns any folder into a Socratic learning project: scaffolds the structure, orchestrates the teach-me -> build-me -> deck lifecycle, and gates a lesson 'done' on auditable artifacts.

skills.name: start
skills.description: Initialize a new Socratic learning project in a folder, or update/migrate an existing one to the current plugin version. Use when the user wants to set up educate, bootstrap a learnings folder, start a learning project, or upgrade an existing project after a plugin update.

skills.name: lesson
skills.description: Orchestrate a learning lesson's lifecycle — placement, scaffolding, the teach-me -> build-me -> deck seam, and the Definition-of-Done gate.
